test.command: cargo test -j 4 && (cd src-tauri && cargo test -j 4) && (cd frontend && npm test -- --run)

rejectedObservations.observation: Round-1 shared-state observations from non-fix feature reviews remained present in the reviews directory during rerun synthesis.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as already-documented in round 1; round 2 reviewed only the fix feature (`m3-fix-snapshot-mapping-error-classification`) and introduced no new shared-state observations.
